title: Production Pipeline Architecture
description: Architecture diagram of a production NLP pipeline with caching, three confidence-based processing paths, graceful error fallback, and a cache write-back loop.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Analyze how a production NLP pipeline routes queries by confidence to balance latency and accuracy
Explain how caching and graceful error fallback improve reliability and speed
Match example queries to the fast, standard, or complex processing path
